tools.name: company_overview
tools.description: Get company identity, location, size, stage, founders, and mission. Performs web research.

tools.name: company_products
tools.description: Get products, services, features, and pricing information. Performs web research.

tools.name: company_business_model
tools.description: Get revenue streams, unit economics, and go-to-market strategy. Performs web research.

tools.name: company_target_market
tools.description: Get ideal customer profile, segments, and geographic markets. Performs web research.

tools.name: company_financials
tools.description: Get revenue, profitability, and key financial metrics. Performs web research.

tools.name: company_funding
tools.description: Get funding rounds, valuation history, and investors. Performs web research.

tools.name: company_leadership
tools.description: Get CEO, C-suite, board members, and key hires/departures. Performs web research.

tools.name: company_culture
tools.description: Get Glassdoor ratings, employer brand, and work policies. Performs web research.

tools.name: company_clients
tools.description: Get notable customers, case studies, and customer metrics. Performs web research.

tools.name: company_partnerships
tools.description: Get strategic partners, integrations, and ecosystem. Performs web research.

tools.name: company_technology
tools.description: Get tech stack, patents, R&D focus, and AI capabilities. Performs web research.

tools.name: competitive_landscape
tools.description: Get competitors, positioning, and market share. Performs web research.

tools.name: company_market
tools.description: Get industry classification, TAM/SAM/SOM, trends, and regulations. Performs web research.

tools.name: company_news
tools.description: Get recent news, launches, partnerships, and announcements. Performs web research.

tools.name: company_strategy
tools.description: Get growth plans, M&A activity, and IPO signals. Performs web research.

tools.name: company_risks
tools.description: Get competitive, regulatory, legal, and operational risks. Performs web research.

tools.name: company_esg
tools.description: Get ESG initiatives, sustainability, and brand perception. Performs web research.
